summary: Iteration 33 - PillarPicksSection (Mira's Picks) Testing on Care, Stay, Travel pages. PASSED after fixing TravelPage bug. Section shows API data when available, with fallback ready for empty responses.

issues: Console warning: 'Encountered two children with the same key' - duplicate key issue in React
Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement recommended

critical_code_review_comments: PillarPicksSection FALLBACK_PICKS_BY_PILLAR correctly defined with items for all 12 pillars (celebrate, dine, care, stay, travel, learn, enjoy, fit, paperwork, advisory, services, shop)
Fallback logic works correctly: when API returns empty picks, concierge fallback items are shown
API currently returns data (catalogue + concierge items), so fallback is not triggered in normal use - this is correct behavior
Fixed TravelPage.jsx bug: PillarPicksSection was using selectedPets[0] instead of userPets[0], causing section to not render

success_rate.frontend: 100% (3/3 pillar pages show Mira's Picks section correctly after fix)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user with pet
context_for_next_testing_agent: PillarPicksSection (Mira's Picks for {Pet}) now works on Care, Stay, Travel pages. The section shows: 1) API data (catalogue items + concierge items) when available, 2) FALLBACK_PICKS_BY_PILLAR when API returns empty. Fixed TravelPage bug where PillarPicksSection used selectedPets[0] instead of userPets[0]. Concierge request flow works - clicking 'Let Mira Arrange This' opens cart drawer with request details.

features_verified.stay_page_mira_picks: PASS - Shows 'Mira's Picks for Mystique' with catalogue items (Premium Pet Boarding ₹1500, Stay Essentials Kit ₹2499, etc.)
features_verified.travel_page_mira_picks: PASS (after fix) - Shows 'Mira's Picks for Mystique' with catalogue items (Pet-Friendly Hotel Stay ₹5000, etc.)
features_verified.concierge_request_flow: PASS - Clicking 'Let Mira Arrange This' opens cart drawer with request
features_verified.section_not_empty: PASS - Section always shows content (API data or fallback)
features_verified.soul_based_reason: PASS - Shows personalized reason like 'who is naturally protective', 'who can get anxious when left alone', 'who loves car rides'

api_verification.status: WORKING - Returns catalogue picks + concierge picks with proper data structure

bug_fixed.issue: PillarPicksSection was using selectedPets[0] which is empty until user selects pets in wizard
bug_fixed.fix: Changed to use userPets[0] like other pillar pages (CarePage, StayPage)
